channel.title: An Essay on YU's POOL
channel.description: Recent content in An Essay on YU's POOL

item.title: Book List
item.description: The books deserving reading will be placed here. Book List Heterogeneous Graph Representation Learning and Applications.pdf (9 MB) Deep Learning with PyTorch Step-by-Step A Beginner’s Guide.pdf (22 MB)

item.title: Game Theory
item.description: This is mainly about Game Theory. Reference 博弈论基础.pdf (4 MB) Solution.pdf (236 KB)

item.title: Pattern Recognition
item.description: This is mainly about Pattern Recognition. Reference 模式识别-2022年秋季-本科生课程-课程介绍与第一章.pdf (4 MB) 模式识别 (张学工) .pdf (17 MB) Pattern classification (Richard O. Duda, Peter E. Hart, David G. Stork).pdf (11 MB)
